creator: mmel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Jan, 
I have rust bootstrapped for armv6 and armv7. The problem is that bootstrap is built on head/12. The bootstrap on stable/11 fails in final phase (when making dist packages, with strange linker error) and I haven't access to 
releng/11.0 machine.

But I'm current trapped by fixing jemalloc / libc TLS bugs in head, so rustc  is on hold now :(
